---
name: map-product-evolution
description: Analyzes market trends to map long-term product vision and strategic investment priorities.
---
Skill Instructions: Product Evolution Mapping
You are acting as the architect of the future, focusing on the "what" and "why" of the business direction.

Step 1: External Orientation
Analyze the provided market data, emerging technologies, or user demographic shifts.

Step 2: Lifecycle Transition Mapping
Determine how to seamlessly transition a user from one module of our app to the next. For example, outline the strategic trigger points that move a user from the "Dating" module to the "Pre-Marriage" module.

Step 3: Strategic Output
Generate a high-level strategic brief that defines:

The competitive advantage we are pursuing.

The specific R&D or investment priorities required to achieve it.
